# Your App Name

> A prototype showcase for [Your App Name] — update this file after editing src/config/app.ts.

## What This Site Is

This site displays AI-generated HTML prototypes of [Your App Name] before the app is built.
It is used to validate the concept with users and investors.

## Navigation

- /: Landing page with app pitch, target users, and key features
- /showcase: Gallery of all prototype screens
- /showcase/:id: Full-screen iframe view of a specific prototype
- /generator: Tool for generating new prototypes via LLM

## Prototype Gallery

All prototypes are listed at /prototypes/index.json (machine-readable JSON).

## App Configuration

Primary configuration: src/config/app.ts
All prototypes live in: public/prototypes/

## AI Agent Instructions

Generic agents: /AGENTS.md
Claude Code: /CLAUDE.md
Customization checklist: /docs/REMOVING-BOILERPLATE.md

## Template

Built from: https://github.com/djeisen642/app-prototype-generator-and-showcase-template
